workflows.name: 01 — Import and Validate Leads
workflows.purpose: Accept lead JSON, normalize required fields, reject invalid or suppressed records, and return a validation result.

workflows.name: 02 — Generate Outreach Drafts
workflows.purpose: Create a personalized draft only for qualified unsuppressed leads and store it with status=draft.

workflows.name: 03 — Approved Record to Gmail Draft
workflows.purpose: For status=approved only, create a Gmail draft and record the Gmail draft identifier.

workflows.name: 04 — Explicit Send Command
workflows.purpose: Send only an existing Gmail draft whose record has status=send_requested and a matching command token.

workflows.name: 05 — Follow-up Eligibility Check
workflows.purpose: Identify sent records due for a follow-up, create a new draft, and require approval again.

workflows.name: 06 — Reply and Unsubscribe Processing
workflows.purpose: Classify replies, record positive/negative/question/unsubscribe, and immediately suppress unsubscribe addresses.

workflows.name: 07 — Daily Operations Summary
workflows.purpose: Summarize leads, drafts, approvals, sends, replies, suppressions, and errors without exposing message bodies or secrets.
